read_all_memories: list all persistent memories using the MemoryReadTool with no query
search_memories_by_keyword: search persistent memories by keyword using the MemoryReadTool query parameter
filter_memories_by_type: filter memories by type such as user feedback project or reference
write_new_memory: save a new persistent memory with title content type tags and scope
delete_memory_by_id: delete a persistent memory by its ID using the MemoryDeleteTool
